evidence.claim: 肥大细胞增生症 （mastocytosis，MC）也叫 肥大细胞增多症，是以肥大细胞在一个器官或多个器官异常 浸润 为特征的疾病，可以累及 皮肤 、 消化系统 、 血液系统 等，该病临床表现及病理改变十分多 …

evidence.claim: 2025年12月30日 · Systemic mastocytosis (mas-to-sy-TOE-sis) is a rare condition that results in too many mast cells building up in the body. Mast cells are found in tissues throughout the body.
evidence.source_title: Systemic mastocytosis - Symptoms and causes - Mayo Clinic
evidence.raw_snippet: 2025年12月30日 · Systemic mastocytosis (mas-to-sy-TOE-sis) is a rare condition that results in too many mast cells building up in the body. Mast cells are found in tissues throughout the body.

evidence.claim: Mastocytosis is a disorder of abnormal mast cell proliferation with clinical features that include flushing, pruritus, abdominal pain, diarrhea, hypotension, syncope and musculoskeletal pain.
evidence.raw_snippet: Mastocytosis is a disorder of abnormal mast cell proliferation with clinical features that include flushing, pruritus, abdominal pain, diarrhea, hypotension, syncope and musculoskeletal pain.
